name: On the Other Side of the Dimensional Portal
description:
You are on the other side of this dimensional portal!  You look around, and
see walls made of a golden substance harder than titanium and atlantium.  A
divine light illuminates this room.  To the west, you see the rest of this
estate, and to the east, you see a small room with a shrine through a hazy
portal.

exits.description: You see the small room with the shrine.
